page: Google Cloud Platform n2d-standard-96 is a general-purpose server powered by AMD EPYC 7B13 processors utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs, derived from 48 physical cores with simultaneous multithreading at two threads per core. The system is equipped with 384 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include bundled local storage or GPUs, and has zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance, scoring 129,595.62 in stress-ng multi-core tests, placing it in the top 10% of tested systems. Cryptographic capabilities are also highly competitive, with a PassMark CPU encryption score of 101,882.74. Memory performance is strong, yielding a read-only large block bandwidth of 214.48 GB/sec and a write large block bandwidth of 113.87 GB/sec. Single-core performance is strong but slightly more modest, with a stress-ng single-core score of 2,705.09 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1,505.0.

The absence of local NVMe storage and dedicated GPU hardware limits this instance's suitability for direct high-speed local disk caching or hardware-accelerated deep learning training. However, its high core density and strong memory bandwidth make it highly efficient for multi-threaded workloads. It is well-suited for large-scale web serving, software compilation, database operations, and moderate LLM inference tasks, such as prompt processing with small-to-medium models.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-standard-96 is a general-purpose server configured with 96 dedicated vCPUs and 384 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor on the x86_64 architecture. It features 48 physical cores with simultaneous multithreading, offering a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators. In benchmark evaluations, the server delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance and strong cryptographic execution, alongside high memory read and write bandwidths. Conversely, single-core performance and text processing speeds fall into average ranges. This hardware profile is highly effective for multi-threaded workloads, including software compilation, database operations, static web serving, and moderate language model prompt processing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-standard-96 is a general-purpose server featuring 96 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 384 GB of RAM, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for database and web serving workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-standard-96 features 96 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 384 GB of RAM, optimized for multi-threaded general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A high-density, multi-core general-purpose instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and balanced memory for demanding multi-threaded enterprise workloads.

Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and strong cryptographic execution capabilities
High memory bandwidth with 214.48 GB/sec read and 113.87 GB/sec write speeds
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators included
Optimized for database operations, software compilation, and static web serving
